channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 'Deal To End War Is A Declaration Of US Defeat': Top Iranian Negotiator

media:content.media:description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf is the head of the Iranian negotiating team.

item.description: "The Islamabad understanding was not the result of pressure and coercion, but rather the result of the resistance and authority of the brave Iranian nation," Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said.
item.content:encoded: "The Islamabad understanding was not the result of pressure and coercion, but rather the result of the resistance and authority of the brave Iranian nation," Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said.

item.title: Oil Tanker Booked In Persian Gulf At 897% Of Benchmark Rate

media:content.media:description: The oil tanker fee ranks as the highest so far this year.

item.description: South Korean shipowner Sinokor will supply the vessel at 897 Worldscale points, or 897% of the freight benchmark, according to shipbrokers.
item.content:encoded: South Korean shipowner Sinokor will supply the vessel at 897 Worldscale points, or 897% of the freight benchmark, according to shipbrokers.

item.title: US Top Court Sides With ExxonMobil In $1 Billion Cuban Damages Case

media:content.media:description: ExxonMobil refinery in Notre-Dame-de-Gravenchon, northwestern France.

item.description: Exxon had sued Cuban state-owned companies Union Cuba-Petroleo (CUPET) and CIMEX seeking more than $1 billion in damages for the seizure of its property.
item.content:encoded: Exxon had sued Cuban state-owned companies Union Cuba-Petroleo (CUPET) and CIMEX seeking more than $1 billion in damages for the seizure of its property.

item.title: Without Missiles, US, Israel Would Have "Ploughed Iran Just Like Gaza"

media:content.media:description: In recent days, Trump had appeared to soften his stance on the missiles issue.

item.description: Iran's missiles were initially developed to compensate for its weak air defences during the war with Iraq in the 1980s, and have since only gained range and accuracy.
item.content:encoded: Iran's missiles were initially developed to compensate for its weak air defences during the war with Iraq in the 1980s, and have since only gained range and accuracy.

item.title: Trump Rejected Own Data On India Tariffs, Argued With Aide, Claims Book

media:content.media:description: In August 2025, Donald Trump accused India of supporting Russia's war in Ukraine.

item.description: The argument came before the US first imposed a 25% tariff on India as part of its "Liberation Day" trade in April 2025.
item.content:encoded: The argument came before the US first imposed a 25% tariff on India as part of its "Liberation Day" trade in April 2025.

item.title: Why China Is Rushing To Help Rebuild Iran After The War With US

media:content.media:description: The move could also benefit China, as it is Iran's largest trading partner and its biggest buyer of oil.

item.description: China is focusing on emergency humanitarian assistance, such as sending medical supplies and other relief materials to countries affected by conflict.
item.content:encoded: China is focusing on emergency humanitarian assistance, such as sending medical supplies and other relief materials to countries affected by conflict.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Iran Paradox: 2 Things That Can Derail The Peace Process
item.description: The possibility of talks extending for months and years on two crucial issues may turn this 'roadmap' into a never-ending saga.
item.content:encoded: The possibility of talks extending for months and years on two crucial issues may turn this 'roadmap' into a never-ending saga.

item.title: SpaceX's Starfall Capsule Takes Off On Debut Mission, Set For Ocean Landing

media:content.media:description: Starfall is a small, disk-shaped spacecraft.

item.description: SpaceX said the capsule could help businesses develop and manufacture products in space.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX said the capsule could help businesses develop and manufacture products in space.

item.title: China Can Target People Outside Its Borders Under New Ethnic Unity Law

media:content.media:description: The new law goes into effect on July 1.

item.description: China passed the law in March to create a "shared" national identity among the country's 55 ethnic minority groups, which include Tibetans and Uyghurs, some of whom chafe under Chinese rule and have over the years often staged protests, some of them violent.
item.content:encoded: China passed the law in March to create a "shared" national identity among the country's 55 ethnic minority groups, which include Tibetans and Uyghurs, some of whom chafe under Chinese rule and have over the years often staged protests, some of them violent.

item.title: Record-Breaking Heatwave In France Leaves 68,000 Homes Without Power

media:content.media:description: The extreme weather is being driven by atmospheric and circulation patterns.

item.description: The outage, which involved a transformer on the electricity grid, was related to extreme temperatures and did not injure anyone.
item.content:encoded: The outage, which involved a transformer on the electricity grid, was related to extreme temperatures and did not injure anyone.

item.title: Move Over US, This Country Has World's Most Powerful Supercomputer

media:content.media:description: A man monitors the Shenwei (Sunway) TaihuLight supercomputer at the National Supercomputer Center in Wuxi

item.description: The system, called LineShine, topped the closely watched TOP500 ranking unveiled Monday at the major computing ISC conference in Hamburg, Germany.
item.content:encoded: The system, called LineShine, topped the closely watched TOP500 ranking unveiled Monday at the major computing ISC conference in Hamburg, Germany.

item.title: India Rebukes Pakistan At UN, Calls For Review Of Outdated Security Council Mandates

media:content.media:description: Ambassador Harish also linked the debate to ongoing UN reform efforts (File photo)

item.description: The UNSC Arria-formula meeting, co-chaired by China and Pakistan, focused on the implementation of Security Council resolutions and the challenges associated with enforcing them.
item.content:encoded: The UNSC Arria-formula meeting, co-chaired by China and Pakistan, focused on the implementation of Security Council resolutions and the challenges associated with enforcing them.

item.title: Anthropic's Mythos Model Found Vulnerabilities In Classified US Government Systems

media:content.media:description: US administration directed Anthropic to prevent foreign nationals from using Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

item.description: A official said Anthropic had teamed up with US intelligence agencies to conduct tests using the company's Mythos model.
item.content:encoded: A official said Anthropic had teamed up with US intelligence agencies to conduct tests using the company's Mythos model.

item.title: "Going To Happen": UN Watchdog Chief On Inspection Of Iran's Nuclear Sites

media:content.media:description: The IAEA has been allowed to visit other nuclear sites in Iran since the 12-day war in 2025.

item.description: The comment by International Atomic Energy Agency head Rafael Mariano Grossi was the firmest yet from the United Nations agency, which is viewed as key in determining the status of Iran's nuclear stockpile.
item.content:encoded: The comment by International Atomic Energy Agency head Rafael Mariano Grossi was the firmest yet from the United Nations agency, which is viewed as key in determining the status of Iran's nuclear stockpile.

item.title: Trump, JD Vance Call Iran Deal A Payday For US Farmers, Tehran Denies It

media:content.media:description: Lashing back at critics on his Truth Social media platform, Trump said US farmers would get a payday.

item.description: Donald Trump and JD Vance say that any frozen funds and assets held outside of Iran will be used to buy US crops.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump and JD Vance say that any frozen funds and assets held outside of Iran will be used to buy US crops.

item.title: No Kennedy In Congress Next Year As Jack Schlossberg Loses New York Race

media:content.media:description: Jack Schlossberg got plenty of attention in the race.

item.description: The campaign was colourful and hotly contested, partly because of Schlossberg's star power as the social-media-savvy grandson of the late President John F Kennedy, but also because the race became an expensive proxy fight among artificial intelligence interests.
item.content:encoded: The campaign was colourful and hotly contested, partly because of Schlossberg's star power as the social-media-savvy grandson of the late President John F Kennedy, but also because the race became an expensive proxy fight among artificial intelligence interests.

item.title: Barnacles, Algae And Delays: The Cleanup Challenge As Hormuz Gradually Reopens

media:content.media:description: After spending months anchored in warm Gulf waters, many vessels now need extensive underwater cleaning

item.description: Barnacles, algae and mussels are creating fresh delays for ships waiting to resume journeys through one of the world's busiest oil routes
item.content:encoded: Barnacles, algae and mussels are creating fresh delays for ships waiting to resume journeys through one of the world's busiest oil routes

item.title: SpaceX Sells $25 Billion In Bonds To Cut Elon Musk's Interest Burden

media:content.media:description: Demand for SpaceX debt suggests that many investors have faith.

item.description: Ahead of SpaceX's historic $75 billion initial public offering earlier this month, Elon Musk fused many of his disparate companies into a conglomerate that investors gushed over, even though it doesn't yet make a profit.
item.content:encoded: Ahead of SpaceX's historic $75 billion initial public offering earlier this month, Elon Musk fused many of his disparate companies into a conglomerate that investors gushed over, even though it doesn't yet make a profit.

item.title: Legal Tech Firm Sues US Over Order Limiting Foreign Access To Top-Tier Anthropic Models

media:content.media:description: Anthropic and the United States are locked in legal battles in Washington and California federal courts

item.description: Legion LegalTech asked a U.S. judge to vacate and set aside the administration's directive targeting Anthropic.
item.content:encoded: Legion LegalTech asked a U.S. judge to vacate and set aside the administration's directive targeting Anthropic.

item.title: "Indians Won't Do That": Trump On India As Ukraine Peacekeeper Force Plan

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump, Prime Minister Narendra Modi (File)

item.description: Donald Trump reportedly shot down a plan to use Indian troops as a peacekeeping force in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump reportedly shot down a plan to use Indian troops as a peacekeeping force in Ukraine.
